description: Sonoff Basic R1 smart relay switch with ESP8285, 10A relay, and mains power input. Flashable with ESPHome for local control. Popular entry point for smart home retrofitting.

featured_bundles.description:
Adds the GPIO output for the onboard LED plus a binary light entity
so it surfaces as a controllable light in Home Assistant.
featured_bundles.name: Status LED (full setup)

featured_components.description:
The 10 A AC relay is hard-wired to GPIO12. This recommendation pre-fills
the GPIO and gives it a sensible default name.
featured_components.name: Onboard Relay

featured_components.description:
Front-panel push button on GPIO0 (active low — note ``inverted: true``
plus the internal pull-up).
featured_components.name: Front-Panel Button

featured_components.description:
Low-level GPIO output for the onboard blue LED on GPIO13. Pair with
a ``Status LED Light`` so Home Assistant can toggle it as a light.
featured_components.name: Status LED Output

featured_components.description:
Binary light entity for the onboard status LED. Wire its ``output``
to the ``status_led_output`` you added.
featured_components.name: Status LED Light

name: Sonoff Basic

pins.label: BUTTON
pins.notes: Strapping pin — wired to the front-panel button (active low, internal pull-up)

pins.label: GPIO2
pins.notes: Strapping pin — must be high during boot

pins.label: GPIO6
pins.notes: SPI Flash CLK — do not use

pins.label: GPIO7
pins.notes: SPI Flash D0 — do not use

pins.label: GPIO8
pins.notes: SPI Flash D1 — do not use

pins.label: GPIO9
pins.notes: SPI Flash D2 — do not use (may be usable in DIO mode)

pins.label: GPIO10
pins.notes: SPI Flash D3 — do not use (may be usable in DIO mode)

pins.label: GPIO11
pins.notes: SPI Flash CS — do not use

pins.label: STATUS_LED
pins.notes: Onboard blue status LED (active low — must be inverted)

pins.label: GPIO15
pins.notes: Default SPI CS — strapping pin (must be LOW during boot)

pins.label: GPIO16
pins.notes: RTC wake pin — no PWM, no I2C, no interrupts; used for deep sleep wake

pins.label: A0
pins.notes: Analog input (TOUT pin) — 0-1V range, single ADC channel; not a standard GPIO
